title: Create: Levitite Fields
description: Adds a more interesting way to obtain levitite
body:
When I first started playing Aeronautics, I thought how cool it would be to harvest levitite by physically grabbing it. Thus, Levitite Fields was born. In this mod, you can go to the Levitite Fields and capture floating levitite clusters to use in your contraptions.

## Features

Adds 2 biomes where floating levitite clusters generate one in the overworld and the other in the end

## Faq

### Ports

1.  Fabric: not for the foreseeable future, as I do not know Fabric, and Create: Aeronautics is not on Fabric yet
2.  Different Versions: Possibly

## Plans

1. Levitite Dragon
2. Painted Levitite Fields

## Possibly Upcoming

1.  Levitite Spread that removes weight from any block it's put on
2.  Stationary Plunger Launcher

Mods used in Screenshots are Euphoria Patches, Complementary Shaders, and Distant Horizons
